sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_last_index (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayLastIndex(x -> x > 10, values) AS last_index FROM test_array_last_index;
UPDATE test_array_last_index SET values = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayLastIndex(x -> x < 6, values) AS last_index FROM test_array_last_index WHERE id = 1;
